name: ToolSnap MCP
description: Context-efficient microtools for AI agents. Flagship: fetch_extract with 98.1% median token reduction (53,820 → 2,001 tokens). Saves ~$0.156/call at Sonnet pricing. Costs $0.02 USDC on Base via x402 protocol. First call free per wallet. 10 free utility tools (UUID, hash, Base64, URL encode/decode, JSON, timestamps, text stats).
